topics: Definition and significance of soft computing
Differences between hard and soft computing
Fuzzy Logic: Fuzzy Sets and Membership Functions, Fuzzy Rules and Inference Systems
Genetic Algorithms: Working Principle and Operators (Selection, Crossover, and Mutation)
Neural Networks: Learning rules and Activation functions, Single Layer Perceptrons, Multilayer Perceptrons, Backpropagation Algorithm, Architecture
Open-source libraries: TensorFlow, Keras (simple programs only)
Industrial Machine Vision: Basic concepts of image formation, Radiometry and geometric transformations, Geometric Camera Models
Pinhole camera model, Perspective projection and camera parameters
Spatial domain and Frequency domain methods for image enhancement
K-Means, Mixture of Gaussians, Classification: Discriminant Function (Supervised, Un-supervised, Semi-supervised)
Vision algorithms for identifying end wires: Binary vision algorithm, Grey-scale vision algorithm, Active ranging using structured light technique in industrial vision
